name: pods-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM PODS (the SIGMOD/SIGACT Symposium on Principles of Database Systems), the database-THEORY symposium co-located with SIGMOD: routing theory work between PODS and its systems siblings, the multi-cycle-per-year submission calendar, lightweight double-anonymous EasyChair review with a revision/shepherd round, the acmsmall 15-page-plus-unlimited-references-and-appendix budget, rigorous proof appendices and full-version-on-arXiv norms, PACMMOD PODS-track publication, and the Alberto O. Mendelzon Test-of-Time culture. Grounded in the PODS 2026 (Bengaluru) and PODS 2027 (Huntington Beach) calls, the sigmod.org/PODS pages, ACM DL / PACMMOD, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
